title: The Altered Torque Log
description: Inside the draughtsmen's field cabinet, tucked behind the main bore log binder, you find a single loose sheet — a daily torque reading summary in Ethan Philbrick's hand, with the original baseline figure of 41 clearly visible. Over it, in a different hand and different ink, someone has written 62 and underlined it twice. The alteration is not subtle; whoever did this was not trying to be undetectable. They were trying to be fast.
